series_metadata.series_description: All documents relating to expired or inactive license applications and grant or denial of an administrative license or permit. Retain in office for 1 year then transfer all paper documents to a record storage facility for 10 years. After 10 years, shred/destroy documents. Contains all original applications for license or permit, supporting documentation, address, phone numbers and Board correspondence to and from licensee. Also, copies of adjudication orders, consent agreements.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Maintain in office for one year then transfer all paper documents to a record storage facility for 10 years., Paper: Shred
